title: orchis papilionacea subsp. rubra
intro: Orchis papilionacea subsp. rubra is a rare subspecies of the bee orchid plant, characterized by its vibrant reddish-brown flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including treating various health issues such as inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Orchis papilionacea subsp. rubra are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and bronchitis. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
